englishDefinitions: we promised each other that we would not reveal a secret
used to say that a secret was supposed to stay hidden
persianTranslation: قول دادیم که هیچ‌وقت فاش نکنیم
examples: We swore we'd never tell anyone about it.
They said we swore we'd never tell, but the secret came out anyway.
We swore we'd never tell, yet years later she finally told the truth.
synonyms: we promised to keep it secret
